title: No Villager Trading
description: A lightweight mod to disable villager trading while keeping all other villager mechanics intact.
body:
A lightweight mod to disable villager trading while keeping all other villager mechanics intact.

## Features
* Disables villager interaction without breaking other villager-based NPCs
* Keeps all other villager features (raids, breeding, professions)
* Optional disabled-trade message to player when trying to trade (ON by default)
* Server-side (no need to install on client)

## Perfect for
* Modpacks seeking more challenge
* Servers wanting to prevent trade exploits
* Players looking for a more balanced gameplay experience

## Available for
* Fabric
* Forge
* NeoForge
